title: Neutralize workflow artifact directory and plan naming
summary: Rename workflow artifacts from refactor-specific naming to generic workflow naming while preserving existing records.
results: Renamed the workflow artifact root from .dev/refactor-workflows to .dev/workflows.
Renamed per-workflow refactor-plan.md files to workflow-plan.md.
Updated AGENTS, guides, portability notes, and historical workflow records to the neutralized workflow contract.
